description: A sales director needs a decluttered dashboard. Implement a 'Disconnected Table' pattern in a Power BI report using the data source C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv. The report must allow users to toggle a clustered bar chart between "Revenue", "Units", and "Transactions" metrics. The implementation requires a 'Metric_Param' table with a 'Metric' column and base measures 'Total_Revenue' (Sum of Sales_Amount), 'Total_Units' (Sum of Quantity_Sold), and 'Total_Transactions' (Count of rows). A dynamic measure 'Selected_Metric_Value' should return the appropriate base measure based on the 'Metric_Param'[Metric] selection, defaulting to Revenue. The report must include a slicer for 'Metric_Param'[Metric] and a clustered bar chart showing 'Selected_Metric_Value' by 'Region' with a dynamic title measure 'Chart_Title' ("Metric by Region: " & selection) bound to the visual. Save the final report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Dynamic_Metric_Report.pbix.
